content:
# Recommendations — next plan iter (post iter-044)

## CRITICAL / HIGH

1. **REFACTOR LANE: de-private the next root gate to unblock B1.** B1's δ-conjugation is discharged; its
   sole residual (`sorry` L328) is hard-blocked on two `private` root decls in `TensorObjSubstrate.lean`:
   - `sheafifyTensorUnitIso` (def, L1040)
   - `sheafifyTensorUnitIso_hom_eq'` (lemma, L1837)
   Both additive de-privates, no signature change — identical in spirit to the iter-044 δ-conjugation
   de-private that just worked. **Strongly consider de-privatizing a BATCH** of the root sheafification/
   comparison internals at once (`sheafifyTensorUnitIso`, `sheafifyTensorUnitIso_hom_eq'`, and any sibling
   `pullbackValIso`/`sheafificationCompPullback` helpers the per-leg close will need — see below), so the
   B1→S2→S4b→telescope route stops surfacing one-at-a-time privacy stops. Route: `refactor` subagent, root
   `TensorObjSubstrate.lean`, SOLO (root churn → build-race; freeze downstream that iter).
   After it lands, B1 closes via: `sheafifyTensorUnitIso_hom_eq'` + `← Functor.map_comp` +
   `tensorHom_comp_tensorHom` → per-leg `H1.inv.app M.val = η ≫ forget (pullbackValIso f M).hom ≫ forget ρM.inv`
   (PUBLIC `pullbackValIso_hom_natural` L1861 + `sheafificationCompPullback_eq_leftAdjointUniq` L1511).

2. **MUST-FIX (lean-auditor): `RelPicFunctor.lean:519–522` `PicSharp` is a wrong stub** — defined as a
   constant functor at `PUnit`. Off the active B1 lane but a real weakened-wrong-definition. Schedule a
   targeted fix / blueprint reconciliation. Report: `task_results/lean-auditor-iter044.md`.

## MEDIUM

3. **Blueprint-writer (lean-vs-blueprint-checker major #2):** the B1 proof sketch in
   `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex` (`lem:tensorobj_restrict_iso_eq_pullback_tensor_map`) under-details — it
   treats the per-leg ρ reassembly as trivial, but the Lean exposed a real `sheafifyTensorUnitIso`
   reconciliation residual the chapter never names. Add a sub-block describing the per-leg sheafification
   identity (`H1.inv.app = η ≫ forget pullbackValIso.hom ≫ forget ρ.inv`). (The stale iter-043 `% NOTE:`
   was already corrected by this review.)

4. **B2 is the one privacy-INDEPENDENT open sorry — candidate for `effort-breaker`.**
   `restrictFunctorIsoPullback_comp_compat` (L243) is genuine ~80–120 LOC mate-pseudofunctoriality
   (`mateEquiv_vcomp`/`leftAdjointUniq_trans`). The obvious `unit_leftAdjointUniq` shortcut is CIRCULAR
   (confirmed iter-044) — **do NOT re-assign that shortcut**. Break it into the per-square mate-coherence
   steps before sending a prover. Could be worked in PARALLEL with the refactor lane (different file region,
   no privacy dep).

5. **Stale-status cleanup (lean-auditor majors):** stale "lhs_tmul still sorry" comment
   `TensorObjSubstrate.lean:46–47` (closed iter-039); stale "typed-sorry OnProduct"
   `LineBundlePullback.lean:40–56`; false "5 pins complete" in two files. Comment-only; sweep when those
   files are next touched.

## Do NOT retry without structural change
- **B1 per-leg residual via any PUBLIC lemma** — `sheafifyTensorUnitIso_hom_natural` only commutes the
  factor, cannot remove it. Blocked until the de-private (rec #1) lands. (Verified iter-044.)
- **B2 via `unit_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app`** — circular (goal becomes B2 itself). Verified iter-044.
- **S2/S3/S4a/S4b/telescope** — strictly downstream of B1/B2; do not assign until those close.
- **S2 via `restrictFunctorComp.hom.naturality`** — gives morphism-naturality, not immersion-naturality
  (iter-040, re-noted).

## Trajectory note (for progress-critic input)
B1 made a genuine code advance (δ-conjugation discharged, residual isolated) but sorry 7→7. The route is
NOT churning-with-no-residual-shrink: each iter the residual is provably smaller (iter-043: signature fix;
iter-044: full δ-conjugation discharge + single named per-leg gap). It IS gated on a repeating external
condition (root privacy), resolvable only by a refactor lane — NOT by more prover helpers in
TensorObjInverse.lean. Recommend: dispatch the refactor (rec #1) BEFORE the next B1 prover round.

## Coverage debt (LOW)
`archon dag-query unmatched` = 104 `lean_aux` nodes (whole-project, pre-existing). 0 NEW this iter (prover
added no top-level decls). Enumeration deferred — not session-introduced.
